Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 35}The {f 0 1 2}Rage{f 0 1 27} ailment causes one to lose their sense of reason. Enraged enemies will aggressively target you, {f 0 1 2}even from a distance{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 35}They will {f 0 1 2}charge upon spotting you{f 0 1 27}, but {f 0 1 2}struggle to redirect the force of their trajectory{f 0 1 27}, so keep your calm, sidestep, and wait for your opening to attack.[n]{f 1 1}
